items.title: [正面] Morimens is a PC port of a gacha deckbuilder for m...
items.summary:
Morimens is a PC port of a gacha deckbuilder for mobile devices. But before you stop reading lol.. It's actually pretty good.

Pros: 
-Exceptional anime art
-Interesting gameplay mechanics for the deckbuilder genre

Cons:
-UI Issues. The big con here is that the game is too zoomed in to see everything properly. Card text is cut off (you have to raise it with cursor), and on some rare occasions the story text is cut off.

-Story. It seems interesting on paper, but very difficult to get into since the exposition is pretty awful. There's tons of filler and the main story arc is hard to understand as the overall narrative and history wasn't explained well enough at the start of the game.

-Translation issues. The Terms of Service is not in english. I generally don't like clicking accept to a 20 page wall of foreign text when I install apps on my PC. The rest of the game is mostly understandable to an experienced RPG or CCG player so this is a very minor con.

-Stamina system. It's a gacha so this is to be expected. The story is very long, doesn't require stamina, and is a fun roguelike mode, so this seems not too bad overall.

In summary, it's a pretty solid deckbuilder so far if you can overlook the gacha character/gear acquisition, UI issues, and are in it for the gameplay.

items.summary:
- Good Story 
- Good Gameplay Mechanics
- Good Content Pacing
- Good Gacha System

9/10 would recommend to try this game out.
